prompt_text:
### Demographics: 54-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Overweight
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 57.5 kg; Height 154.4 cm; BMI 24.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.8%; 9 months ago 8.5%; 6 months ago 8.8%; 3 months ago 8.9%; current 9.8%), FPG (12 months ago 162mg/dL; 9 months ago 235mg/dL; 6 months ago 245mg/dL; 3 months ago 248mg/dL; current 259mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 58.3kg; 9 months ago 58.3kg; 6 months ago 53.7kg; 3 months ago 57.7kg; current 57.5kg), Height (12 months ago 154.4cm; 9 months ago 154.4cm; 6 months ago 154.4cm; 3 months ago 154.4cm; current 154.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 140mmHg; 9 months ago 141mmHg; 6 months ago 144mmHg; 3 months ago 141mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 17U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 12U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 16U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 6.6mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 5.9mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 7.5mL/min/1.73m²; current 4mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 360mg/g; 9 months ago 269mg/g; 6 months ago 410mg/g; 3 months ago 312mg/g; current 419mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 74mg/dL; 6 months ago 75mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 71mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 119mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 122mg/dL; 3 months ago 119mg/dL; current 128mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
